name: Improving the Performance of Automatic Short Answer Grading Using Transfer Learning and Augmentation
summary: ASAG study using sentence-transformer transfer learning and non-LLM text augmentation techniques on programming short-answer responses in the SPRAG corpus.

access_attempts.result: Crossref metadata verified DOI, authors, venue, volume, and article number.
Direct page fetch returned Cloudflare error; official indexed abstract and highlights were available through web search result.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction is limited to official abstract/highlights and search-indexed ScienceDirect text, not full article tables.
